testcase.name: placeOrder_multipleFromSameTable_createsSeparateOrdersInSameSession
testcase.system-out:
2026-03-31T14:26:49.144+07:00 INFO 12376 --- [ main] t.c.s.AnnotationConfigContextLoaderUtils : Could not detect default configuration classes for test class [com.restaurant.integration.OrderControllerIntegrationTest]: OrderControllerIntegrationTest does not declare any static, non-private, non-final, nested classes annotated with @Configuration. 2026-03-31T14:26:49.150+07:00 INFO 12376 --- [ main] .b.t.c.SpringBootTestContextBootstrapper : Found @SpringBootConfiguration com.restaurant.RestaurantApplication for test class com.restaurant.integration.OrderControllerIntegrationTest
